title: podman-remote volume inspect|ls
body:
add the ability to list and inspect volumes using the remote
client and varlink

Signed-off-by: baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

comments.body: the next volume based PR will enable tests and add API documentation to all volume related commands where applicable
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably #2264) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.
